overview.description: EU-sovereign AI models and private cloud infrastructure with full GDPR compliance
overview.description_long: Yubetsu s.r.o. is a Prague-based startup providing EU-hosted AI solutions and private cloud infrastructure designed for data sovereignty and GDPR compliance. Services include custom RAG systems, enterprise AI chat, EU-hosted LLMs, private cloud storage, email/web hosting, and startup consultancy. Originally founded with a focus on AI-generated scientific journals (Yubetsu Codex), the company pivoted to EU-sovereign AI and cloud infrastructure. Servers in Prague, Frankfurt, and Paris.

history.origin_story: Founded in December 2023 in Prague. Originally focused on AI-generated scientific publishing (Yubetsu Codex), pivoted to EU-sovereign AI models and private cloud infrastructure for GDPR-compliant enterprise and research use.

key_milestones.event: Pivoted from AI scientific journals to EU-sovereign AI & cloud services

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Yubetsu's core offering is hosting and deploying existing AI models (LLMs, RAG systems) on EU infrastructure. As hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) expand GDPR-compliant EU regions and sovereign cloud offerings, Yubetsu's data-residency differentiation shrinks. No proprietary AI technology or data moat is evident.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: EU data sovereignty and GDPR compliance is a real and growing regulatory need, especially for public sector and research clients. However, the market is crowded with well-funded EU cloud providers (OVHcloud, Hetzner, Deutsche Telekom) and hyperscalers expanding EU sovereign zones, making differentiation difficult for a 5-person startup.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding. Very small team (5 employees), founded late 2023, and no publicly visible customer traction or revenue signals. The company appears bootstrapped with limited runway.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Combination of no proprietary technology moat, intense competition from hyperscalers and established EU cloud providers, and apparent lack of external funding makes this a high-risk early-stage venture. The pivot from AI scientific publishing further signals uncertainty about product-market fit.

metadata.notes: Company registered 21 Dec 2023 as Yubetsu s.r.o. (IČO: 21056064). LinkedIn description (AI scientific journal) differs from current website (EU-sovereign AI & cloud), suggesting a pivot. Servers listed as Prague, Frankfurt, Paris. No public funding info found.
